'''Tsyklen''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tsyk]] in [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]]. The species had exceptional vision and nimble [[Limb/Legends|hands]] of nine digits each. The Tsyklen were considered wily, and the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] species saw them as a prized client species. During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] invaders [[Attack on the Tsyk system|attacked]] the Tsyklen [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]].

==Biology and appearance==
The Tsyklen were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tsyk]]<ref name="HG" /> in the [[Tsyk system/Legends|Tsyk system]].<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Tsyk system/Legends|Tsyk system]]</ref> They had at least one [[Gender/Legends|sex]], female. They were round in shape with [[Hair/Legends|hairless]], taut skin and had large [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], which granted them exceptional vision. Tsyklen possessed particularly nimble [[Limb/Legends|hands]], each of which had seven fingers and two opposable thumbs. Their digits were so long and delicate that they easily could be mistaken for tentacles.<ref name="HG" />

==Society and culture==
Tsyklen were considered crafty in nature.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>

==History==
The Tsyklen [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] was considered part of [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]] as early as [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]], and the species was counted as a prized client species by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]], who controlled the region. Tsyk became a heavily polluted planet.<ref name="TEA" /> During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], in which the [[Extragalactic/Legends|extra-galactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] invaded and sought to conquer [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] from [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] to [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> the Yuuzhan Vong [[Attack on the Tsyk system|attacked]] Tsyk between [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]] and [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]]. By 27 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]], Tsyk was held by the invaders.<ref name="TEA" /> At some point after the Yuuzhan Vong's defeat at the end of 29 ABY,<ref name="NEC" /> the planet reverted to being part of Hutt Space. It remained so in [[137 ABY]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Tsyklen in the galaxy==
At least one [[Unidentified Tsyklen forger|female Tsyklen]] left her homeworld. She was considered the best [[Identichip/Legends|identification]] forger on the planet [[Nar Hekka]]<ref name="HG" /> in [[5 BBY/Legends|5 BBY]].<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' states that ''[[The Hutt Gambit]]'' is set in [[5 BBY/Legends|5 BBY]].</ref> That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] hired her to make false identification for him and his [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] partner, [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]]. Her manual dexterity and exceptional vision made her well suited to the career and allowed her to manipulate two [[holo-scriber]]s at once.<ref name="HG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tsyklen first appeared in ''[[The Hutt Gambit]]'', a novel released in [[1997]] as the second installment of [[The Han Solo Trilogy (hardcover)|''The Han Solo Trilogy'']], written by [[A. C. Crispin]].<ref name="HG" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The Hutt Gambit]]'' {{1st}}
